originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging Neural MMO Seeding and Fixing Breakout Score Bug with New Python C API Bindings
summary: Worked on porting PufferLib environments to new Python C API bindings, replacing Cython. Fixed a score counting bug in Breakout caused by converting integer division to float division. Investigated a seeding issue in Neural MMO that caused flat learning curves for billions of steps before improvement. Unboxed and set up a new 5090 GPU machine for benchmarking.
